name: Continuum — Health Intelligence
subtitle: Your personal health OS
description:
Continuum is a personal health intelligence system that understands your health data, tracks it over time, and tells you what to do next.

Upload lab reports, describe symptoms, and chat with an AI that actually knows your health history. Get proactive insights before problems grow. Know which specialist to see and when.

Features:
• AI-powered health analysis from your reports and symptoms
• Proactive health insights with severity indicators
• Complete health timeline with trend tracking
• Specialist recommendations based on your data
• Dual engine: rule-based safety + LLM intelligence
• Secure, private — your data never leaves your control

appStoreConnect.reviewNotes:
Test account: demo@continuum-health.app / Demo1234!
The app uses AI to analyze health data. Backend API is live at https://api.continuum-health.app
All AI responses include medical disclaimers. No actual medical advice is provided.
